titleStmt.title: SII 15.237: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 237. (B.K. No. 28 of 1927-28.) UṆACHGĒRI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up near the public well.

This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Pārthiva, Pushya śu. 13, Sunday Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. The date is not regular. The year Pārthiva falling in the reign of Sinda Chāvuṇḍa corresponds to 1165 A.D. In that year Pushya śu. � occurred on December 17, the weekday being Friday. The said Saṁkramaṇa howover, occurred on December 25, Saturday.
It records a gift by Heggade Īśvarayya, of the Hejjuṅka and Bīravaṇa taxes, under the instructions of Chāvuṇḍarasa. The latter part of the record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Engraved in continuation of No. 122 of South Indian Inscriptions. Vol. XI, Part II.
div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ sāhasōttuṁga bhujabaḷabhīma vī
racavuṁḍarasadēvara besadiṁ hejjuṁka bīravaṇada haggaḍa Īsvarayyagaḷu 10 neya pā
¨rtthiva saṁvatsarada pusya su 13 Ādivāra yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu kūṁṭage
ya bīḍina staḷadalli tiṁgaḷiṁga biṭṭa vī 5 © piriyaranugra ca bhūpati
vīranāki siṁgarasa sahasrabāhu taraḍagiṁ
ḍeyanāḍi . ©
di yiṁ
damaged
yiṁ nuta siṁdavaṁsa
mēruge biṇpuvāThe rest of the record is
Digital edition of SII 15.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
